content: Core tables for logistics MIS: suppliers (id, name, contact, email), products (id, sku, name, category, reorder_threshold), inventory (product_id, current_quantity), stock_transactions (id, product_id, type IN/OUT/ADJUSTMENT, quantity, reference_type, reference_id, reason, created_by), purchase_orders (id, po_number, supplier_id, status DRAFT/ORDERED/RECEIVED, order_date), purchase_order_items (po_id, product_id, qty_ordered, qty_received, unit_price), users (id, email, password_hash, role). Key: stock_transactions is append-only — current_quantity is derived or maintained via trigger. PO receipt creates stock_transactions of type IN.
